business_ideas.idea: Rental companionship marketplace for platonic friend experiences (RentAFriend model)
Papa: on-demand elder companionship and task help marketplace
Rental people who do nothing silent companion service
Porch pumpkin decoration seasonal service for $300-1500 per job

predictions.text: Loneliness in society will drive massive growth in companionship-as-a-service businesses
Seasonal blue collar services like pumpkin and light decoration are viable million-dollar businesses
